call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car down payment, actually. 
Agent: Perfect! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that fit within your budget? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, I think so. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. 
Eleanor: Okay. That sounds reasonable. 
Agent: Wonderful! So, to proceed, I just need to verify a few details… your address is still Denver, Colorado, correct? 
Eleanor: Yes. 
Agent: Excellent. And your monthly income is around $6500? 
Eleanor: That’s right. 
Agent: Fantastic. Okay, Eleanor, I’m going to go ahead and process this for you. You’ll receive an email with the final loan agreement within 24 hours. 
Eleanor: Great, thank you! 
Agent: You're very welcome! Have a great day.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Financial Freedom. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, this card offers… 
Robert: No, thank you. Don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Secure Finance. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark from GreenTech mentioned something. I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. The terms are very flexible. 
Jessica: 12.5%? That seems a little high. I was hoping for something lower. 
Agent: I understand. However, given your self-employment status, that's a very competitive rate. We can explore options, but this is the best initial offer. The monthly payments would be around $330 for 60 months. 
Jessica: Hmm. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $300 origination fee, but no annual fees or prepayment penalties. 
Jessica: Okay. And what if I want to pay it off early? 
Agent: No problem at all! You can pay it off at any time without any extra charges. 
Jessica: Alright. Let me think about it. I need to compare with my bank. 
Agent: Absolutely. I can send you a detailed loan proposal via email outlining all the terms and conditions. Would that be helpful? 
Jessica: Yes, please. 
Agent: Great! I'll send that over right away. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions. 
Jessica: Thanks, David. 
Agent: You're welcome, Jessica!

Agent: Hello, Mr. Davis? This is Lisa from Prime Financial. We have a fantastic offer on our Signature Credit Card. 
Michael: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We… uh… 
Michael: Inconvenience?! This is harassment! I'm on the Do Not Call list! I want my number removed immediately! We are offering a $5000 Signature Credit Card at 17.99%... 
Agent: Sir, please let me explain… 
Michael: No! Just take me off your list! *click*

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Alex from Universal Lending. I see you submitted an application for a personal loan online. 
Patricia: Oh, yes, hello. I… um… I need a little help with some medical bills. 
Agent: I understand. We are pre-approving you for a $3000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%. It's a bit higher due to your credit score, but it can help you manage those bills. 
Patricia: 24.99%? Oh dear. That's… that's quite a bit. Could you repeat that, please? I didn't quite catch it. 
Agent: Certainly. It's 24.99% interest. The monthly payments would be approximately $88 for 48 months. 
Patricia: Hmm. And are there any other fees? 
Agent: There's a $150 processing fee. 
Patricia: Okay. Well, I'm not sure I can afford that. But… maybe. Could you send me some information in the mail? I'm not very good with computers. 
Agent: Absolutely! I can send you a detailed brochure outlining all the terms and conditions. Would you like me to confirm your mailing address? 
Patricia: Yes, please. It's… 123 Ocean Drive, Miami, Florida. 
Agent: Perfect. I'll get that sent out today. Please review it carefully, and feel free to call us back if you have any questions. 
Patricia: Thank you so much. 
Agent: You're very welcome, Ms. Rodriguez. Have a good day.
